extortion.description: Asteco is a real estate services firm based in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), with its headquarters in Dubai. It offers a wide range of real estate services including property management, valuation, research, investment consultancy, and sales and leasing brokerage. Asteco has been a prominent player in the UAE’s real estate market for several years, providing services to both individual clients and corporate entities Leaked data size: 11.4GB.
